name: Praline Apple Waffle Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat waffle iron to medium-low.
2. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar and butter until blended.
3. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
4. Sift flour into a measuring cup; level off. Add flour, baking powder, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg; mix well.
5. Stir in apples and pecans.
6. Spray waffle iron with nonstick cooking spray.
7. Drop dough by heaping teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto the waffle iron.
8. Bake 1 1/2 to 2 minutes or until cookies are golden brown.
9. Remove from waffle iron immediately and cool on a wire rack for 1 minute.
10. Repeat with remaining dough.
11. In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon; mix well.
12. Using the powdered sugar mixture, dip or dust both sides of slightly warm cookies.
13. Serve warm or cool. Store in a tightly covered container.
